verified_against: CCA membership from SDG&E's Active CCAs page. Franchise fee percentages from the Electric Preliminary Statement, General Information section H.1 (EGENERAL, tarfKey 1), Advice Ltr. 3326-E effective Jan 1 2019.
_purpose: City drives two things the bill depends on: which CCA can serve you (and, for SDCP, which of its two rate schedules), and the franchise fee percentage.

franchise_fee._source: Preliminary Statement H.1: 'The Franchise Fee Differential will be based on the difference between the franchise fee percentage and 1.1%.' So 1.1% is the franchise fee already built into every customer's rates, everywhere in the territory.
franchise_fee._differential_source: Preliminary Statement H.1: 'The following is the applicable Franchise Fee Differential: City of San Diego 5.78%.' San Diego is the only political subdivision listed, so every other city pays the 1.1% base and no differential.
franchise_fee._total_is_base_plus_differential: A city's total franchise fee percentage is base_pct + its differential: 1.1% everywhere, 6.88% in the City of San Diego. Both figures are corroborated by real bills — a City of San Diego SDCP account was charged 6.88% and a Clean Energy Alliance account in another city was charged 1.10%. Before this was sourced, the two looked like unrelated constants.
franchise_fee._where_each_applies: The differential is charged on SDG&E's own billing. The equivalent surcharge is charged to CCA customers on SDG&E's imputed generation, at the city's TOTAL percentage — which is why a City of San Diego CCA customer sees 6.88% there.

_cca_note: Membership is where the city is enrolled by default. A customer can always opt out to SDG&E bundled service, so this narrows the choices rather than fixing them.

cities.name: Somewhere else in SDG&E territory
cities._note: SDG&E also serves part of southern Orange County. No CCA, and the 1.1% base franchise fee.

_not_modeled.opt_out: Customers in a CCA city who opted out to SDG&E bundled service. Selecting a city does not force a provider — SDG&E stays available everywhere.
_not_modeled.annexation: Membership changes as cities join or leave a CCA. Re-check this file when rates are updated.
_not_modeled.orange_county: SDG&E's southern Orange County territory is folded into the catch-all entry rather than enumerated, since no CCA serves it and the franchise fee is the base rate.
